creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
(In reply to benoit from comment #0)
Thanks for reminding me. As I'm currently traveling I'm a bit slow on updating the *arr ports and I'm sorry for that.
Later today I will be able to upload a patch, as I have been running this new sonarr version since monday on my own setup, just did not have the change yet to create a patch.

Cheers
